tasks.subject: HTTP-Policy T2: wire status policy into routes.ts handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Default handler classifies HTTP status: permanent→noRetry+fail-once; block→session.retire()+retry; transient→retry. Replaces unreachable :320-340 block.

**Files:** Modify crawler/src/routes.ts (import; :198 add session; :320-340 block)

**Verify:** from crawler/: npx tsc --noEmit clean; npx tsx src/tests/test_routes.ts 0 failed; test_httpStatusPolicy green.

Full code: plan Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npx tsc --noEmit && npx tsx src/tests/test_routes.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["classifyHttpStatus imported", "session in destructure", "permanent noRetry / block retire / non-ok throw", "bookkeeping preserved"], "planTask": 2}
```
